title: Extracting Names and Titles from a String
scenario: Write a prompt to extract names and titles from a given string. The string may contain multiple names and titles separated by commas or spaces. The output should be a list of extracted names and titles.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the code adheres to JavaScript syntax and is correctly formatted.
Verify if the code meets the character limit and uses the correct language syntax.
Check if the code correctly extracts the names and titles from the given string.
